testcase.name: Login with happy flow 2
testcase.system-out: Given accept cookie.........................................................passed When click initial sign in button...........................................passed When input email sgqa-ccn-72920@mailinator.com and password CCNPegasus123 and press sign in to continue login.passed And back to the main tab browser............................................passed Given "User A" click product tab to subscribe to product....................passed And Select plan "Plan A" "Moaah"............................................passed
